'''Barr Moutil''' was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor Cruiser]] ''[[Stellar Web]]'', under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Teren Rogriss|Rogriss]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
